heading: Obligated service
label: 7654 Obligated service
text: A person receiving assistance under this subchapter shall provide service in the full-time clinical practice of the person’s profession as a full-time employee of the Department for the period of obligated service provided in the agreement of such person entered into under .section 7603 of this title
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “7603” for “4303”.Pub. L. 102–40section 4354 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “7603” for “4303”.Pub. L. 102–40section 4354 of this title
